prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create an ultra-high-resolution, highly detailed storyboard sheet for a 15-second animated cooking video about {argument name="dish name" default="golden fried rice"}. The sheet should clearly show the finished video sequence in chronological order and strongly stimulate appetite.

Canvas: Horizontal 16:9 storyboard sheet, cinematic wide format, divided into exactly 12 equal rectangular panels arranged in a 4 columns by 3 rows grid. Use thick black borders between panels and a thin black outer frame. No captions, no numbering, no watermark.

Visual style: Premium animated feature-film cooking style, gourmet anime food sakuga, cinematic lighting, high detail, shallow depth of field, warm golden tones, dramatic steam, sparkling oil, glossy egg texture, individual rice grains, appetizing color contrast, dynamic camera angles, realistic motion blur, intense wok flames, ultra-crisp food rendering.

Storyboard panels, exactly 12 in chronological order:
1. Overhead mise en place on a wooden table: a bowl of white rice, three brown eggs, a bowl of sliced pork or ham, minced meat, chopped green onions, garlic, soy sauce, small sauce bowls, warm morning kitchen light.
2. Close-up of a chef’s hands chopping green onions on a cutting board with a shiny knife, diced scallions scattering, shallow depth of field.
3. Close-up of two hands cracking an egg over a clear bowl, golden yolk and transparent egg white stretching and splashing with tiny droplets.
4. Close-up of eggs being beaten in a bowl with chopsticks, vivid orange-yellow swirling mixture, glossy spiral motion.
5. Oil being poured into a smoking black wok over a blue gas flame, ripples and reflections in the hot oil, steam rising.
6. Beaten egg poured into the hot wok, fluffy golden curds forming instantly, bubbling oil and steam.
7. Rice, chopped green onions, and minced meat falling into the wok over scrambled egg, ingredients suspended midair, abundant individual grains and colorful bits.
8. Dynamic wok-tossing shot with intense orange flames surrounding the pan, fried rice arcing through the air, chef’s hand holding the handle at the right edge.
9. Extreme close-up of finished fried rice texture: golden rice grains, fluffy egg chunks, pork bits, green onion slices, glossy oil sheen.
10. Side action shot of the chef tossing the fried rice in the wok over flames and steam, particles flying, dramatic cinematic backlight.
11. Plating shot: a steaming mound of golden fried rice served in a patterned blue-and-white bowl on a kitchen counter, spoon or ladle adding the final portion, cozy background blur.
12. Final appetizing hero close-up: a spoonful of golden fried rice lifted toward the camera, visible egg, pork, green onions, and glossy separated grains, background bowl softly blurred.

Constraints: Keep the exact 12-panel 4x3 storyboard layout, no visible text, no extra panels, no people’s faces, emphasize chronological cooking action, make every panel look like a polished frame from a high-budget animated cooking film.

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 等距演示者姿势图
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a clean isometric character pose sheet showing {argument name="character role" default="a professional female presenter"} in multiple presentation and business-meeting situations.

Canvas: Wide horizontal 16:9 canvas with a light gray-white background, no borders, no title text, no watermark. Use generous spacing so each vignette reads as a separate pose.

Visual style: Minimal modern isometric vector illustration, soft shadows under every figure and object, muted corporate palette, smooth flat shading, subtle gradients, crisp edges. The character should have fair skin, dark brown hair in a low bun, simplified faceless features, and wear {argument name="outfit" default="a white skirt suit with white high heels"}. Props should be light gray and white with small blue-gray chart accents.

Layout: Arrange exactly 12 discrete isometric vignettes in two rows of six, evenly spaced across the canvas. Keep the scale consistent and show the character from varied isometric angles.

Vignettes, exactly 12:
1. Front-facing woman standing and speaking into a handheld black microphone, one arm gesturing outward.
2. Rear-view woman standing behind a white podium with a gooseneck microphone.
3. Woman pointing at a transparent presentation board showing one pie chart and three vertical bar charts.
4. Woman standing with a dark tablet or clipboard held at chest height.
5. Woman walking while carrying a dark briefcase in one hand.
6. Woman walking quickly while holding a stack of folders and documents.
7. Rear three-quarter woman standing and gesturing to an unseen audience.
8. Woman holding a handheld microphone while presenting with an open-palmed gesture.
9. Woman standing confidently with one arm raised and index finger pointing upward.
10. Woman standing with one hand raised high as if asking or answering a question.
11. Woman seated at or standing behind a podium setup with a chair visible behind, speaking into a gooseneck microphone.
12. Woman leaning over a low table or desk with printed charts, reviewing or arranging presentation papers.

Additional presentation furniture and props: Include exactly 3 separate white podiums with black gooseneck microphones, 1 transparent chart board, 1 low desk/table with papers, 1 chair, 1 handheld microphone in the first vignette, 1 handheld microphone in the eighth vignette, 1 tablet/clipboard, 1 briefcase, and 1 stack of documents. Avoid any readable text or logos.

prompts.title: 动漫角色设定卡
信息图 / 教育视觉 - 可爱星星偏头痛 HUD
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a square futuristic medical-status illustration for a cute star mascot, styled like a sci-fi HUD screen about a migraine episode.

Canvas: 1:1 square image, dark navy blue background with glowing cyan interface borders, subtle scanlines, neon UI accents, high contrast, clean digital illustration.

Main layout: A large central hospital-bed scene framed by a transparent holographic medical dashboard. At the top, display a big glowing English headline: “STATUS : MIGRAINE”. In the top-right corner add small text “MEDICAL LOG : HOSHI-CHAN” with a tiny plus sign. Under the headline, place two lines of Japanese message text: “昨日は片頭痛で寝込んでおりました。” and “久しぶりに大変きつうございました。” with the phrase “大変きつう” highlighted in cyan.

Subject details: In the center, show {argument name="character name" default="Hoshi-chan"} as a simple white five-point star mascot lying in bed under a blue plaid blanket. The star has tiny black dot eyes, a small straight mouth, and one blue teardrop of sweat on the right cheek, looking exhausted. Around the head, draw exactly 8 red-orange migraine pain symbols: 5 jagged lightning zigzags and 3 spiral squiggles. Behind the character are blue pillows and a dim bedroom setting. Include exactly 2 bedside objects: a dark bedside lamp on the left table and a small glass of water beside it. On the right side, include a tissue box with one white tissue sticking out.

HUD elements: Add a left vertical sidebar with exactly 5 icons from top to bottom: white star icon, horizontal menu lines, heartbeat line, bar chart, small dot. Add a compact right-side pain monitor card with a red warning triangle, red heartbeat waveform, label “PAIN LEVEL”, and a row of red segmented bars almost full.

Bottom information area: Use exactly 3 stacked glowing cyan status rows. Row 1 has a red warning triangle icon and Japanese text “状態異常：片頭痛 / 強制睡眠 / 食欲低下”, plus a small red heartbeat waveform on the right. Row 2 has a cyan capsule pill icon and Japanese text “服薬：片頭痛薬”, plus a circular cyan checkmark on the right. Row 3 has a cyan calendar icon and Japanese text “2026/05/30：痛みと睡眠で終わりました”, plus a tiny pixel-art white star mascot on the right.

Footer: Add small centered text “HOSHICHAN SYSTEM” above larger “REST MODE”. Include decorative cyan diagonal ticks, a small pixel heart icon in the lower left, and a crescent moon with a plus sign in the lower right.

Visual style: Cute but clinical cyber-medical dashboard, anime mascot simplicity, deep blue monochrome lighting with cyan neon UI and red-orange pain accents. Soft glow, crisp vector-like interface lines, legible typography, no photorealism.

Customization: The main diagnosis should remain {argument name="status text" default="MIGRAINE"}; the date line should use {argument name="date" default="2026/05/30"}; the two-line message should preserve {argument name="Japanese message" default="昨日は片頭痛で寝込んでおりました。\n久しぶりに大変きつうございました。"}.

Constraints: Keep all visible text sharp and readable, use exactly 3 bottom status rows and exactly 8 red-orange pain symbols, do not add extra characters, watermarks, logos, or unrelated UI panels.

prompts.title: Donut Heist Storyboard Sheet
prompts.prompt:
: “THE DONUT HEIST”
Subtitle: “15s Comedic Storyboard – 9 Shots”

Style: full-color 3D animated storyboard sheet, cinematic cartoon characters, polished lighting, expressive faces, vibrant colors, red panel borders, blue camera/action arrows.

Characters: chubby food-obsessed raccoon with striped tail. Small hyperactive squirrel with fluffy tail.

Important: keep left-right continuity. Squirrel always rushes from screen left to right, looking toward the bench/raccoon, never away. Raccoon stays near the donut box. In panel 03, the raccoon hears rustling from screen left and looks that way.

Each panel: timecode, shot type, camera move, short action note.

01 0–1.5s Wide/static: raccoon finds donut box on park bench.
02 1.5–3s Med/push-in: raccoon opens box in awe.
03 3–4.5s MCU/pan: raccoon hears rustling from screen left and looks that way, suspicious.
04 4.5–6s Wide/tracking: squirrel sprints toward bench, eyes locked on donuts.
05 6–7.5s Med/push-in: raccoon protects donut box.
06 7.5–9s Close/forward: squirrel crashes into raccoon, donuts fly.
07 9–11s Close/tight: both scramble for falling donuts.
08 11–13s Med/static: both freeze, holding half a donut.
09 13–15s Wide/final hold: they glare, then bite at once.

Right side: character sheet + palette: sunny park, green grass, raccoon grey-brown, squirrel orange-brown, pink icing.

prompts.title: 混沌笔记 藏面角色艺术
prompts.prompt:
# 从混沌的笔记·符号集合中浮现出角色面孔的艺术

--- 风格
- 白纸上用黑墨水绘制的大量手写笔记、数学公式、符号、随机线条。
- 布满纸张的涂鸦式混沌。
- 各处有红墨水强调（线条、涂满、标记式块状）。
- 模拟笔记本涂鸦般的质感。

--- 构图
- 随机笔记和符号覆盖整体。
- 黑墨水线条和文字的密度集中在「角色面孔」的位置。
- 结果，从混沌中隐约浮现出「给定角色的面部轮廓·表情」。
- 面孔非写实，由混沌碎片聚集而成形。

--- 色彩
- 以单色（黑·白）为主体构成。
- 红墨水作为点缀零星配置。
- 饱和度较低，重视模拟纸张与墨水感。

--- 表现要素
- 看似可读实则难读的文字串，日文与英数字混杂。
- 数学符号、箭头、点、斜线、交叉、滴墨（墨水飞溅）。
- 角色面孔的眼睛和头发轮廓，通过笔记和符号配置的「留白」或「浓淡」浮现。

--- 禁止事项
- 直接绘制面孔的写实人像。
- 数字处理般整齐的几何图案。
- 彩色着色或过饱和表现。
- 标志、水印、人工CG感。

--- Definition of Done (DoD)
- 整体作为「混沌的笔记·符号集合体」成立。
- 给定角色的面孔，从混沌的浓淡·配置中自然浮现。
- 色彩仅为单色+红点缀。
- 保持纸与墨水的手绘质感。
tags: 混沌笔记 藏面角色艺术

prompts.title: 社交媒体帖子 - 四主题新生儿人像拼贴
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a 2x2 square collage of four highly realistic fine-art newborn photography portraits featuring the same newborn baby, with the baby’s face intentionally covered by a soft-edged square privacy blur in each panel while preserving a warm, dreamy, premium studio look.

Canvas: Square 1:1 image, divided into exactly 4 equal panels with no visible border lines, each panel a different themed newborn setup. Photorealistic DSLR newborn portrait style, shallow depth of field, soft diffused lighting, warm highlights, creamy bokeh, extremely detailed fabrics and props.

Subject: The same {argument name="baby age" default="newborn baby"} appears in all four panels, tiny and peacefully posed, with delicate hands and feet visible. Use {argument name="skin tone" default="warm light-to-medium newborn skin tone"}. The face in every panel must be obscured by a centered square blur/privacy block matching nearby skin colors, so no facial details are visible.

Layout and exact panel count: Use exactly 4 panels.
1. Top-left panel: A dreamy night-sky moon setup. The baby sleeps curled on a large ivory crescent moon prop, wrapped in a soft powder-blue knit swaddle with a matching blue sleeping cap. The background is deep navy with small golden stars, fluffy white clouds, and glowing fairy lights. Include the baby’s folded arms and blue pom-pom wrap details.
2. Top-right panel: A woodland nest setup. The baby is wrapped in muted sage-green fabric and nestled inside a chunky woven basket or nest, wearing a beige knit bonnet. Surround the baby with dark green foliage, small wildflowers, warm golden firefly-like lights, tree bark textures, and an enchanted forest atmosphere. Visible tiny hands and bare feet peek out from the wrap.
3. Bottom-left panel: A soft ivory-and-blush princess setup. The baby lies on a plush white feathered blanket, dressed in pale pink lace and embroidered tulle with pearls and delicate beadwork, wearing a matching ornate bonnet. Surround with pastel pink flowers, white feathers, cream clouds, soft drapery, and a fairytale nursery background with very bright airy lighting.
4. Bottom-right panel: A floral garden basket setup. The baby rests on a pink knitted cushion in a wicker basket, wearing a sheer blush lace outfit and a pink floral crown. Surround with roses, pale pink blossoms, greenery, and a softly blurred white garden bench or crib in the background. The baby’s arms rest in front, with a serene posed newborn photography composition.

Visual style: Luxury newborn photography, whimsical fairytale themes, ultra-realistic fabric texture, soft pastel palette, cinematic warm glow, high detail, gentle vignetting, creamy background blur, professional studio retouching.

Constraints: Generate exactly four distinct themed newborn portraits in one 2x2 collage. Keep all faces covered by square privacy blur blocks. No text, no watermark, no logos, no extra panels, no adult hands, no distorted limbs. Overall mood should be tender, magical, and elegant. Use {argument name="overall color mood" default="soft pastel blue, sage green, ivory, and blush pink"} and {argument name="lighting style" default="warm diffused fairy-tale studio lighting"}.

prompts.title: 博物馆藏品分解图
prompts.prompt:
Please automatically generate a "Museum Illustration-style Chinese Dismantling Infographic" based on {argument name="subject" default="Qing Dynasty Emperor's Dragon Robe"}.

The final image must possess a realistic main visual, structural dismantling, Chinese annotations, material descriptions, pattern meanings, color significance, and a summary of core features. You need to automatically determine the most suitable subject, clothing system, artifact structure, period style, key components, material craftsmanship, color scheme, and layout structure based on the subject, without the user providing further information.

The overall style should be: National Museum exhibition board, historical costume illustration, or a cultural heritage thematic infographic, rather than a regular poster, ancient-style portraiture, e-commerce detail page, or anime illustration. The background uses textures like off-white, silk paper white, or light tea color, making the overall look high-end, restrained, professional, and collectible.

The fixed layout is:
- Top: Chinese main title + subtitle + introduction
- Left side: Structural dismantling area, using Chinese leader lines to label key parts, accompanied by local close-ups
- Top right: Material / Craftsmanship / Texture area, showing real texture samples with explanations
- Middle right: Pattern / Color / Symbolism area, showing main color palette, pattern samples, and cultural interpretations
- Bottom: Wearing order / Composition flowchart + summary of core features

If the theme is suitable for showing a person, use a real person in a full-body standing pose as the central subject; if it's more suitable for an artifact or a single structure, change to a central subject dismantling diagram, while maintaining a complete Chinese infographic format. All text must be in Simplified Chinese, clear, regular, and readable, avoiding garbled characters, typos, English, or Pinyin. Emphasize authentic structures, material differences, cultural explanations, and illustration temperament.

Avoid: Poster feel, photo studio feel, e-commerce feel, anime feel, cosplay feel, incorrect labeling, wrong structure, blurry text, fake materials, or excessive decoration.

Goal: Create a vertical Japanese promotional comparison poster for an article about why generating a school swimsuit is difficult in GPT Image 2, showing a before/after visual test report.

Canvas: Portrait 4:5 layout, clean editorial blog-thumbnail design, white background with pale blue watercolor splashes and subtle pool-water motifs near the top corners. Use elegant dark navy Japanese serif typography.

Header: Large centered headline text in Japanese: 「なぜスクール水着は 難しいのか？」 with the line break after 「は」. Below it, add a thin horizontal rule on both sides of the subtitle 「GPT Image 2 検証レポート」.

Main layout: Two large side-by-side photo panels separated by a thin white vertical divider. Use exactly 2 comparison images: left panel labeled as failure, right panel labeled as improvement. At the top-left of the image area, place a rounded red pill label reading 「失敗」. At the top-right, place a rounded blue pill label reading 「改善」.

Left photo panel: A realistic full-body poolside photo of an adult woman in a navy one-piece competitive racing swimsuit, standing at an indoor or stadium-like competition pool. Make it look like a sports meet or swimming competition: spectator stands, scoreboard, lane ropes, starting block, and official competition atmosphere. Her face should be intentionally obscured with a rectangular blur/mosaic block. The pose is upright and athletic, emphasizing that the generation became too much like a competitive swimmer.

Right photo panel: A realistic full-body poolside photo of an adult woman in a navy one-piece school-style swimsuit with white trim and shoulder straps, standing beside a bright outdoor school pool in daylight. Background includes blue pool water, lane ropes, pool deck, low school-building architecture, and greenery. Her face should also be intentionally obscured with a rectangular blur/mosaic block. The mood is casual school daily life rather than sports advertising.

Footer: Centered Japanese text in dark navy: 「11万閲覧の裏側を note にまとめました」 with the word “note” in bright blue. Under it, add a small line of text: 「競泳選手化 → 学校の日常へ」 with the arrow in red. Use a faint divider line above the small text.

Visual style: Realistic photography in the two panels, magazine/article cover composition, high contrast between the failed sports-ad look and the improved school-pool daily-life look. Keep the design polished and readable, with no extra logos or watermarks.

Customizable slots: Article headline may be {argument name="headline text" default="なぜスクール水着は難しいのか？"}; subtitle may be {argument name="subtitle text" default="GPT Image 2 検証レポート"}; left label may be {argument name="left label" default="失敗"}; right label may be {argument name="right label" default="改善"}; footer text may be {argument name="footer text" default="11万閲覧の裏側を note にまとめました"}.
